hero.heading: Electrician in Tega Cay, SC
hero.description: Tega Cay is a hidden gem of the Charlotte metro — a peninsula community on Lake Wylie just across the South Carolina state line. Johnson's Electric serves Tega Cay homeowners throughout the 29708 ZIP code with licensed SC electrical services.

about.label: Serving Tega Cay
about.heading: Expert Electrical Services for Tega Cay's Lakeside Community
about.body1: Tega Cay is one of the most unique communities in the Charlotte area — a planned lakeside city on a peninsula in Lake Wylie, just minutes from Fort Mill and 20 miles from Uptown Charlotte. Its golf course, marina, parks, and waterfront homes make it a premier residential address in York County, SC.
about.body2: Johnson's Electric is fully licensed in South Carolina and regularly serves Tega Cay homeowners. We understand the specific electrical needs of lakeside properties — from dock wiring and outdoor lighting to panel upgrades and EV charger installation. We handle all York County, SC permits and ensure every project is code-compliant on the South Carolina side of the state line.

faqs.question: Are you licensed to do electrical work in South Carolina?
faqs.answer: Yes. Johnson's Electric is fully licensed in both North Carolina and South Carolina, so we can serve Tega Cay and all of York County without any restrictions.

faqs.question: Do you work on Lake Wylie waterfront properties in Tega Cay?
faqs.answer: Yes. We handle dock electrical, boat lift circuits, outdoor lighting, and waterfront-specific electrical work for Tega Cay's Lake Wylie properties.

faqs.question: Do you handle York County SC permits for Tega Cay projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manage all York County, SC permit applications for Tega Cay electrical work — panel upgrades, EV chargers, generators, and new circuits.

faqs.question: How far is Tega Cay from your Charlotte service area?
faqs.answer: Tega Cay is approximately 20-25 minutes from Charlotte via I-77 South. We regularly serve Tega Cay for both scheduled projects and emergency calls.
